name: metrics.series
_note: Derives a time-bucketed metrics series from the per-user timeline + case store in STATE keyed by ctx.actor.userId. The assassin's owner actor has no activity → ok:true with all-zero buckets and openCases 0 (NEVER no_db). days is a fail-CLOSED numeric guard (poisoned NaN/Infinity/-1/1e308 → invalid_days, never a clamped ok:true); an absent days defaults to 14 and is then clamped into [1,90].
